title: Ubiquiti U-PoE+ - Gigabit PoE injector 48V/0.65A (30W)
description: U-PoE+ from Ubiquiti is a Gigabit PoE+ injector for powering compatible UniFi and network devices at 48V / 0.65A with up to 30W output.
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000 Gigabit LAN Yes Power The input voltage [V] 230V AC Output Power [W] 30 Pin powering 1,2,4,5 (+), 3,6,7,8 (-) PoE Out ports 1 Output Voltage [V] 48 Output Current [A] 0.65 Efficiency [%] 85+
